_source: B.V. Raman, Muhurtha (Electional Astrology, 1948 1st ed.) [R p.N] + Muhurtacintamani of Rama Daivajna w/ Maniprabha Hindi comm. by Kapilesvara Sastri, Chaukhamba (vivaha-prakarana ch.6) [MC p.N]. Extracted 2026-07-17 from David's scans (For Claude Code folder); studied page-by-page, no gap-filling.
_scan_gaps: Raman scan physically missing printed pp. 62-63, 66-67, 78-81 (Dina/Tara kuta, Gana kuta, Mahendra, Stree-Deergha), 94-97 (tail of exceptions list). MC fold-out charts torn; in-text chakras used.

tara.counting: From each Moon-star to the other's, inclusive, both directions, mod 9 (MC v.24 p.177; examples p.178).
tara.note: MC states twice (p.177): only 3,5,7 inauspicious for melana; 1(janma),2,4,6,8,0 auspicious. Raman's own marriage Dina-kuta page (78) is missing; his election tara (pp.17-18) treats janma as 'danger to body' — election rule, not melana.
tara.scoring_mc: both directions good=3, one good=1.5, both bad=0 (9x9 chakra p.177)

gana.groups_confirmed: MC v.29-30 p.183 — identical to engine groups.
gana.raman_direction: R p.186 (Summary): girl rakshasa + boy deva/manusha barred; the reverse recommended.
gana.parihara: Gana dosha void if rasi lords or navamsa lords are mutual friends (MC v.33 p.187); also void when same rasi + different nakshatras (MC v.35 p.189).

yoni.animals: Engine confirmed for all 27 (Krittika/Pushya printed as sheep = same class as goat; Anuradha/Jyeshtha: MC deer vs Raman hare — same pair, name differs).
yoni.raman_variant: R p.84 prints 'monkey and cat' instead of sheep-monkey and marks the list non-exhaustive — both readings recorded, no winner.
yoni.gradation: MC p.179: mahavaira 0, vaira 1, udasina 2, maitri 3, same 4, with full 14x14 chakra (tiger x horse = 1, worked example p.180). MATRIX NOT HARD-CODED: several interior cells uncertain in the worn scan — re-verify MC p.179 before adopting.
yoni.parihara: Yoni enmity tolerable if rasi-vashya holds (MC p.179).

maitri.friendship_table: Identical in both sources (R p.86; MC p.181) and to canon/planetary-friendships.json.
maitri.note: MC prose line prints 0 for sama+shatru but its own grid consistently prints 1 (five cells checked) — grid used, flagged.
maitri.navamsa_escape: If rasi lords are not friends, kuta exists if the navamsa-moon lords are friends (R p.87, worked example pp.87-88). Also void if janma rasis are 1/7 from each other (R p.93 exc.2).

cancellations: Same lord of both rasis, or lords mutual friends → evil cancelled (R p.85).
MC v.32 p.186 (each REQUIRES nadi-shuddhi): (i) ekadhipatya (ii) rasi lords friends (iii) navamsa lords friends (iv) tara shuddhi (v) rasi-vashya.
Grahamaitri destroys dushta bhakoot; shubha bhakoot destroys graha-enmity — at least one of the two MUST hold (MC v.33 p.187).
Mitra shadashtaka (6/8 pairs with same/friendly lords) auspicious: 1-8, 2-7, 4-9, 5-12, 6-11, 10-3 (MC p.185).
bhakoot.direction_conflict: 2/12 direction: R p.85 girl-2nd-from-boy = longevity(good); MC p.184 (Jyotihprakasha) the opposite. Both recorded, no winner.

nadi.groups_confirmed: Both sources identical to engine (R pp.91-92; MC v.34 pp.187-188).
nadi.middle_worst: Same madhya nadi = certain death (MC p.188); Raman p.92: middle absolute, first/last 'may under certain circumstances'.
exceptions_mc_v35_p189: Same rasi + different nakshatras → no nadi dosha AND no gana dosha.
Same nakshatra + different rasis → no nadi dosha.
Same nakshatra + different padas → no dosha (boy's star first in zodiacal order preferred).
nadi.raman_exception: R p.93 (4): nadi evil ignored if rasi+rajju kutas prevail, or same planet lords both janma rasis (list cut off by missing pp.94-97).
nadi.pada_fallback: R p.92: nadi may be reckoned by pada, cycling V P S | S P V |… from Ashwini-1.

vashya.raman_lists_confirmed: All 12 sign→group lists verbatim R p.88; unit 2; NO mutual/one-way sub-scoring in the surviving text (engine's split is an implementation choice, flagged).
vashya.mc_alternate_model: 5-class (quadruped/nara/jala/keeta/Leo) vashya-bhakshya system scoring 2/1/0.5/0 (MC v.23 pp.176-177) — irreconcilable with Raman's lists; engine follows Raman.

varna.omitted_by_design: Velea does not score people by station (David's call).
varna.for_the_record: Both sources score 1/0 by groom-grade >= bride-grade. Sign groups CONFLICT: R pp.90-91 Kshatriya {Leo,Sag,Libra}, Vaisya {Aries,Gem,Aqu}, Sudra {Tau,Vir,Cap} vs MC v.22 Kshatriya {Leo,Sag,Aries}, Vaisya {Tau,Vir,Cap}, Sudra {Gem,Lib,Aqu}. Brahmin triad identical {Pis,Sco,Can}. MC escape: boy's rasi-lord's varna outranking cancels (p.175).

kuja.first_house_absent: R p.98 stanza (dhane vyayecha…) — the 1st is NOT in this text.
cancellations_r_pp99_100: Both charts have the dosha → cancelled.
Mars in Aquarius or Leo: no dosha whatsoever.
Mars conjunct Jupiter or Moon: counteracted.
kuja.mc: Vivaha-prakarana as read is silent on kuja dosha.

totals_mc.bands: <=16 nindita · 16-20 madhyama · 20-30 uttama · 30-36 uttamottama; with dushta bhakoot the bars rise (<=20 nindita, 20-25 madhyama, 25-30 shreshtha)

weighting: Nadi 'the most important' (R p.91); Graha Maitram 'the sine qua non' (R p.187); 'without nadi-shuddhi no guna is pure' (MC p.186).
southern_extras_raman: Rajju (groups + effects, R pp.88-89), Vedha pairs (pp.89-90), Mahendra & Stree-Deergha (definitions lost with pp.78-81).
